title: [kimi-review] 1d4545c: [SEVERITY: low] The new citation format `draft-lichen-tdma:2
description:
Commit: 1d4545c15
Message: fix(kconfig): resolve codereview for RPL/SCHC/L2 callback, now_ms, PoE, T-Deck LVGL, board Kconfig

Finding: [SEVERITY: low] The new citation format `draft-lichen-tdma:2a.2` is nonstandard for IETF references (draft sections are normally cited as "Section X.Y of draft-..."), and `2a.2` looks like an internal spec numbering, not an IETF draft section. Also, replacing the normative phrase "unsigned modular arithmetic" with the vaguer "(wrap semantics)" loses precision about the required behavior of `now()`.
